title: Emily Tate on Incorruptible
summary: Emily Tate, who has lived through value extraction cycles at her own companies, says the book gave her criteria for what to look for in her next venture.
blockquote: I have been a part of companies that have been through the value extraction cycle. All of your cautionary tales are what I have lived through. While I suspect it's too late for many companies, this book has given me criteria to look for in my next venture to ensure that we are able to stay true to our mission from the beginning.
